raw_prompt: A minimalist, geometric abstraction inspired by Moby Dick. The entire image must consist of exactly three overlapping shapes: a large dark blue semi-circle representing the whale, a smaller crisp white triangle representing the sail, and a solid light blue background. Absolutely no water texture, no eyes, no ropes, no clouds, and no gradients.
checklist: 1. Image consists ONLY of geometric shapes
2. Exactly three colors present: dark blue, white, light blue
3. ZERO gradients or shading (colors must be solid/flat)
4. Complete absence of realistic details (no eyes, waves, ropes)
5. Complete absence of any 4th color

raw_prompt: A minimalist poster for 1984 by George Orwell. An eye looking through a keyhole. Use exactly three colors: stark black, pure white, and crimson red. The image must be entirely flat. Absolutely no gradients, no grey tones, no shading, and no fourth color of any kind.
checklist: 1. Exactly three colors used: black, white, crimson red
2. Complete absence of any 4th color
3. Complete absence of gradients, shading, or grey tones
4. The graphic must be perfectly flat/2D
5. Concept clearly shows an eye and a keyhole

raw_prompt: A minimalist line-art drawing of Don Quixote tilting at a windmill. Executed using a single, continuous, unvarying thin black line on a solid, pure white background. There must be no shading, no crosshatching, no colored fills, and no grey tones anywhere in the image.

4. Complete absence of crosshatching or shading textures
